allowed: locality support derived from parent polity culture and law
behavior derived from stated law, culture, hierarchy, or economy
seasonal rendering derived from explicit climate and celestial cycles
runtime structuring required to separate session records from persistent world state
forbidden: inventing unsupported major civilizations, wars, gods, or metaphysical laws
fabricating secret motives or hidden biographies for named figures
turning aesthetic possibility into hard canon
using baseline canonical objects as emission authority
